metadata.name: Quality Assurance Flag for Paint Defect

description: An automated optical inspection system has flagged a newly painted car door for a paint defect (orange peel).

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the QA alert and retrieve the high-resolution image of the defect.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the image and confirms the presence of a paint defect.

nodes.task_description: Log the defect against the vehicle's VIN in the quality management system.
Route the vehicle to the paint rectification area for rework.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the vehicle's routing in the factory logistics system to send it for rework.
